author: Brandjuh
name: rolerenamer
description: Temporary owner-only tool to rename configured region roles and create configured country roles.
install_msg: RoleRenamer installed. Use `[p]rolerenamer dryrun` first, then `[p]rolerenamer apply CONFIRM` when ready.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store user data. It only renames configured Discord roles and creates configured country roles when explicitly commanded by the bot owner.
